top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says investors are making a mistake with the trillion-dollar tech giants
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that investors are making a mistake when comparing all the "Magnificent Seven" companies when they all have vastly different businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Europe's innovation performance strengthens amidst global competition
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 09 Jul 2026 Europe's innovation performance continues to improve, with the EU's overall score rising by 11.6 percentage points since 2019, according to the 2026 European Innovation Scoreboard (EIS), just released by the European Commission.
